code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < parts.len()
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(p)
        match string.parse_int(p)
        when Some(n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end

    let n = nums.len()
    mut a = nums
    mut k = 1
    while k < n
      mut j = k
      while j > 0
        match a.get(j - 1)
        when Some(left)
          match a.get(j)
          when Some(cur)
            if left > cur
              mut rebuilt: List<Int> = []
              mut t = 0
              while t < n
                if t == j - 1
                  rebuilt = list.push(rebuilt, cur)
                else if t == j
                  rebuilt = list.push(rebuilt, left)
                else
                  match a.get(t)
                  when Some(v)
                    rebuilt = list.push(rebuilt, v)
                  when None
                    ()
                  end
                end
                t = t + 1
              end
              a = rebuilt
              j = j - 1
            else
              j = 0
            end
          when None
            j = 0
          end
        when None
          j = 0
        end
      end
      k = k + 1
    end

    mut out = ""
    mut idx = 0
    while idx < a.len()
      match a.get(idx)
      when Some(v)
        if idx == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      idx = idx + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
